text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The seasons have changed once again.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Exactly, City. Then, my trainer—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Slide!

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text:
Jordan! Come here a sec! There's something I
wanna show you!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, whoa... What's going on? You're
seriously rushing me.

text_block_list.name: Gyarus B and C
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh! They're on the racetrack...

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! They're joining the next tryouts! Both of
them are totes fired up! They say they're
definitely gonna get trainers!

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text: My debut race got decided too! So, like...

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text:
Teach me how to run, Jordan! I wanna win races
just like you!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Totally—like I would say no!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan has managed to leave a wonderful
mark these last three years. Thanks to that, next
year is also looking—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock... Slide.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Thank you as always for all your hard work,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The woman at the door is Tosen Jordan's
homeroom teacher. We've had the chance to
speak each time Jordan's needed extra classes or
a makeup exam.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's been a breeze for me compared to you.
Anyway, I was wondering... Is Jordan planning to
race next year as well?

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text: Ah... Good, I'm glad to hear it.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll be able to keep track of her on TV, even
though she won't be my student anymore.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Run like the wind! Wahey!

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text: Wahey!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Haha... You're lagging behind! Palmer is straight
savage, so you're not gonna be able to catch her!
choice_data_list: Teaching your friends how to run?
Teaching your friends how to run?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Meh, something like that! They said they're all
doing tryouts soon! So we're getting help from
Palmer and City too...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
By the way, what's my homeroom teacher doing
behind you? That's hilarious—since when did you
two become friends?
choice_data_list: Since you had to do all those extra classes.
Since you had to do all those extra classes.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Hahaha... Well, thanks for scheduling all
those.
choice_data_list: So, I have something to talk to you about.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You want to let her see me run? Why?
choice_data_list: She said she's leaving the academy.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
That's right. You see, I'm getting married. My
fiancé and I are moving back to my hometown.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want to see for myself how far my
class's number one pain in the neck has come.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, are you allowed to say that to your
students?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Meh, whatever. I'll do it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan and her friends all line up on the
track.

text_block_list.name: Jordan and Friends
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They all take off at the same time. Mejiro Palmer
manages to snag the lead, with Daitaku Helios
right on her tail.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan is in the middle of the pack. She
and Gold City are waiting for their chance...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: GRRRAAAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And for some reason, Gold Ship appears behind
them.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
...You know, I could never get her to stay awake
in class. But look how happy she looks when she's
running.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, wasn't there a time I flew into
your office right after New Year's break to talk
about it?

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
She was such a handful—I was genuinely
concerned. But ever since you became her
trainer...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I'm not gonna loooose!

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text: I feel like she's changed. No, it's like she's become the real Jordan.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text: So... thank you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uuugh... I'm running on fumes...

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Jordan. Keep up the good work.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Um, sure thing...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You too. Thanks for everything.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text: Of course.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... So she's really leaving, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So I joined my friends for practice today, right?
'Cause they have tryouts soon.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
One year, three years... Time seriously flies by in
the blink of an eye. I mean, I always thought
tomorrow would just be the same as today.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But, like... so much has changed.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey... Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I wanna win more and more races, and not just
normal ones—GOAT level G1 races too.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I wanna make it big! So... until the time comes
when we have to go our separate ways...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
All the way until then... I want you to be my
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Sounds good.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I'm counting on you!
